about.title: About
about.subtitle: Get to know more about my background, education, and what drives me.
about.intro1: I'm an Information Technology student at Industry University of Ho Chi Minh City, focused on software development with a strong growth mindset.
about.intro2: With hands-on experience in AI development, network engineering, and IT support, I bring a unique blend of skills to every project. I'm a quick learner, receptive to feedback, and excel in teamwork and time management.
about.intro3: Currently seeking an Internship/Junior Developer role to contribute to real products and grow my career in software development.
about.universityName: Industry University of Ho Chi Minh City
about.location: Ho Chi Minh City, Viet Nam
about.networkingDesc: CCNA level knowledge (coursework + labs; Routing/Switching, OSPF, NAT, ACLs, VLAN, DHCP)
about.interestsDesc: Strategic trading systems, systems design, embedded tinkering

exp.title: Work
exp.subtitle: My professional journey in technology.
exp.desc1_1: Built an embeddable AI chatbot widget (one-line <script>) used across X+ websites; Python (FastAPI) backend, vanilla JS (Web Components + Shadow DOM) frontend; multi-tenant with per-domain configs.
exp.desc1_2: Implemented REST + WebSocket/SSE streaming, OpenAI/LangChain (RAG), vector DB, Redis rate-limiting, and JWT auth; CSP-compatible, async loading.
exp.desc2_1: Design and implement LAN/WAN networks, VLAN segmentation, and High Availability (HA) architectures.
exp.desc2_2: Build IoT solutions using ESP32 and MQTT, including a Node-RED gateway.
exp.desc2_3: Develop observability dashboards (React) and alerting pipelines.
exp.desc2_4: Monitor the health and performance of websites, IT infrastructure, and servers.
exp.desc2_5: Troubleshoot technical issues across hardware and software platforms.
exp.desc2_6: Install and configure IT systems and networking devices; ensure smooth operations for both internal and client environments.
exp.desc2_7: Respond to customer service requests, guide users through diagnostic procedures, and escalate unresolved issues when necessary.
exp.desc2_8: Communicate technical solutions clearly to non-technical users.
exp.desc2_9: Record and update all support tickets, resolutions, and related documentation.
exp.desc2_10: Maintain direct customer interactions via phone, email, and on-site visits to resolve technical problems.
exp.desc2_11: Design simple websites and support database-related tasks.
experience.job3.company: NEWIT VIETNAM COMPANY LIMITED - AIOT SOLUTIONS COMPANY LIMITED.
experience.job1.company: ASIA TECHNOLOGY EQUIPMENT SERVICES COMPANY LIMITED
exp.desc3_1: Managed SEO for websites, domains, and company servers.
exp.desc3_2: Installed and configured software, hardware, and peripheral devices; handled both internal and external IT systems of the company.
exp.desc3_3: Diagnosed and resolved software/hardware issues, ensuring optimal system performance.
exp.desc3_4: Provided technical support and solutions to customer inquiries via phone, email, or in-person.
exp.desc3_5: Maintained comprehensive documentation of incidents and solutions in the company’s knowledge base.
exp.desc3_6: Participated in incident response for customer-related system issues and followed escalation procedures as needed.
projects.title: Featured
projects.subtitle: A showcase of my work in AI, web development, games, and IoT.
projects.proj1Desc: One-line script drop-in chatbot with per-site settings, streaming answers, and CSP-safe rendering via Shadow DOM. Vector search pipeline for RAG responses.
projects.proj2Desc: 2D endless runner with rigid-body physics, collision detection, and Object Pooling pattern. Local high-score persistence.
projects.proj3Desc: Async data pipeline using ES6+ async/await with OpenWeatherMap API. Dynamic DOM manipulation and error handling.
projects.proj4Desc: Integrated Load Cell with HX711 (24-bit ADC) for high-precision weight data. I2C LCD interface with Tare function.
